products.name: VICIVISION
products.subtitle: About VICIVISION
products.description:
VICIVISION manufactures optical, non-contact shaft measuring machines.
We serve a wide range of industries.
High speed measurement improves productivity.

products.name: TESA
products.subtitle: About TESA
products.description:
TESA is a leading manufacturer of precision measuring instruments.
Global market leader in height gauges.
Reliable and durable instruments.

products.name: Air Dryers
products.subtitle: About Air Dryers
products.description:
These products are perfectly designed by a team of our highly talented personnel making use of supreme class raw material.
Typical application of these air dryers is along with CMMs and Machine Tools.
The entire array of products is widely noticed for their high performance, less maintenance, reliability, corrosion resistance and longer service life.

products.name: Prima Series
products.subtitle: Prima Series
products.description:
The optical measuring machine for all CNC lathes.
Simplicity allows each operator to control the production process at any time.
The aim is to provide high measurement standards in a new competitive and compact machine.
Detect hundreds of measurements in seconds on all turned and ground parts.
The measuring fields are from 60 to 140 mm diameter and 300 to 600 mm length.

Static measures:
- diameter
- length
- angle
- radius
- chamfer

Dynamic measures:
- coaxiality
- runout
- circularity
- cylindricity
- taper

products.name: Techno Series
products.subtitle: Techno Series
products.description:
Optical measuring devices for micro parts, dental implants and watch components.
High resolution detection of smallest details.
Supports coaxiality, cylindricity, roundness and thread measurements.

products.name: X Series
products.subtitle: X Series
products.description:
Advanced optical measuring devices.
High accuracy for micro parts.
Used in dental and watch industry.

products.name: 1D Height Gauges
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:
TESA 1D height gauge used in workshops.

Reliable optical reading system.

products.name: 2D Height Gauges
products.subtitle: Machine Type
products.description:

products.name: Bluetooth Connectivity
